title: sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat
description:
This is a continuation of sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat. In the current window, the SM persona produced another failed run at 2026-05-29T00:18:13.380847+00:00 with explicit error text `json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length`, which directly indicates the model output was truncated at the token cap and then failed JSON parsing. The surrounding SM runs in the same second succeeded before and after this failure, so the signal is a repeated, narrow truncation event rather than a broad outage.

The impact in this window is low in direct spend and duration, but the error class is high-clarity and attributable to factory/model-output handling rather than story-domain logic. A prior concern already captured the same failure mode on the SM persona, and this window confirms the pattern persists across intervals. That persistence increases confidence that the issue is structural.

Several other failures also occurred in this window, but they are fast, zero-cost sandbox-style failures on onboarder, test_implementer, and dev with `tests not green after run` or null error, all under pytest temporary paths and without story IDs. Those events add noise but do not materially change the main concern because they are ambiguous and appear isolated to harness-style contexts rather than the production chain.

Downstream impact is primarily intermittent SM step failure with potential repeated retries or malformed outputs when this persona hits long responses. Historical review-churn concerns remain inactive in this window, and there is no corroborating tick or queue evidence of a broader stall.

evidence.summary_excerpt: This window included several fast sandbox/test-harness failures plus one diagnosable model-output failure.

evidence.excerpt: persona=sm success=false model=deepseek/deepseek-chat error="json parse failed at max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length: Unterminated string starting at: line 1 column 9 (char 8)" tokens_in=40 tokens_out=80
persona=sm success=true model=deepseek/deepseek-chat attempt_n=796 duration_s=0.007 cost_usd=0.0
persona=sm success=true model=deepseek/deepseek-chat attempt_n=798 duration_s=0.007 cost_usd=0.0

{"noteworthy":"Six failed runs appeared; most are ambiguous zero-cost sandbox/test failures, but the sm failure explicitly says output hit max_tokens with finish_reason=length, which is a clear diagnosable infrastructure/model-config issue."}

{"noteworthy":"onboarder reached failure_count=3 within the window, but these are storyless sandbox-style failures and the errors are mostly ambiguous; worth noting alongside the clearer sm truncation failure."}

escalation_reason: Repeated SM truncation pattern across at least two L2 intervals: prior concern sm-max-tokens-truncation-repeat and a new failed SM run at 2026-05-29T00:18:13.380847+00:00 with explicit `max_tokens=65536 finish_reason=length`. L3 judgment is needed because this is a high-clarity factory/model-configuration failure mode that persists even though surrounding failures in the window are ambiguous harness noise.
